content.problemStatement:
Before you commit anything in git, you need to tell it **who you are** — your **name** and **email address**. \
Git uses this information - **to record who made each change in a project**. 

You can do this using the **git config command** : 

**User Name :**  
Your name will be attached to your commits
```sss
git config --global user.name "Your Name"
```
**Email Address :** \
Your email is also attached to your commits
```sssa
git config --global user.email "youremail@example.com"
```
